UseStandaloneSection.description: When true, the Hangfire dashboard is shown as a standalone section in Umbraco. Default: false.

HangfireServerDefinition.description: Configuration for the Hangfire server (job processor).

Disabled.description: When true, the Hangfire server is not started and no jobs are processed. Default: false.

QueueNames.description: Queue names this server processes. Default: ["default"].

HangfireStorageOptionsDefinition.description: SQL Server storage options for Hangfire. Ignored when using SQLite.

PrepareSchemaIfNecessary.description: Create or update the Hangfire database schema on startup. Default: true.

EnableHeavyMigrations.description: Run heavy schema migrations on startup. Default: true.

CommandBatchMaxTimeout.description: Maximum timeout for command batches in HH:mm:ss format. Default: "00:05:00".

SlidingInvisibilityTimeout.description: Sliding invisibility timeout for queued jobs in HH:mm:ss format. Default: "00:05:00".

QueuePollInterval.description: Interval between queue polls in HH:mm:ss format. "00:00:00" uses Hangfire's recommended setting. Default: "00:00:00".

UseRecommendedIsolationLevel.description: Use the recommended SQL transaction isolation level. Default: true.

DisableGlobalLocks.description: Disable global SQL locks in the storage provider. Default: true.
